zh.Binhamy Castle, Stratton, Cornwall, Engl: 英國英格蘭可瓦爾斯特拉頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Ranulph de Blancminster於1278年出生在英國英格蘭可瓦爾斯特拉頓時，他的父親Sir Reginald Blanchminster33歲，母親Lady Robin19歲。他於大約1301年與Mary Wake在英國可瓦爾斯特拉頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1348年6月23日在英國可瓦爾斯特拉頓享年70歲，埋葬在英國可瓦爾斯特拉頓。

zh-hans.Binhamy Castle, Stratton, Cornwall, Engl: 英国英格兰可瓦爾斯特拉頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Ranulph de Blancminster于1278年出生在英国英格兰可瓦爾斯特拉頓时，他的父亲Sir Reginald Blanchminster33岁，母亲Lady Robin19岁。他于大约1301年与Mary Wake在英国可瓦爾斯特拉頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1348年6月23日在英国可瓦爾斯特拉頓享年70岁，埋葬在英国可瓦爾斯特拉頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Ranulph de Blancminster was born in 1278, in Stratton, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Reginald Blanchminster, was 33 and his mother, Lady Robin, was 19. He married Mary Wake about 1301, in Stratton, Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 23 June 1348, in Stratton, Cornwall, England, at the age of 70, and was buried in Stratton, Cornwall, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Ranulph de Blancminster est né en 1278, à Stratton, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Reginald Blanchminster, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Lady Robin, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Mary Wake environ 1301, à Stratton, Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 23 juin 1348, à Stratton, Cornouailles, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Stratton, Cornouailles, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Ranulph de Blancminster 1278 in Stratton, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Reginald Blanchminster 33 und seine Mutter Lady Robin 19. Er hat um 1301 in Stratton, Cornwall, England Mary Wake geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 23. Juni 1348 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Stratton, Cornwall, England und wurde in Stratton, Cornwall, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ranulph de Blancminster è nato il nel 1278 nel Stratton, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Reginald Blanchminster, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Lady Robin, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Mary Wake circa 1301, nel Stratton, Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 23 giugno 1348, nel Stratton, Cornwall, England, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Stratton, Cornwall, England.

ja.Binhamy Castle Stratton Cornwall England: イギリスコルンワルストラットオン
ja.Binhamy Castle, Stratton, Cornwall, Engl: イギリスイギリスコルンワルストラットオン
ja.Stratton, Cornwall, England: イギリスコルンワルストラットオン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ranulph de Blancminsterが1278年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルストラットオンで生まれた時，父Sir Reginald Blanchminsterは33歳，母Lady Robinは19歳であった。約1301年にイギリスコルンワルストラットオンでMary Wakeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1348年6月23日にイギリスコルンワルストラットオンで70歳で死去し，イギリスコルンワルストラットオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ranulph de Blancminster(이)가 1278년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 스트래턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Reginald Blanchminster(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Robin(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1301년 영국 코른월 스트래턴에서 Mary Wake(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1348년 6월 23일 영국 코른월 스트래턴에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 코른월 스트래턴에 묻혔다.

mn.Binhamy Castle, Stratton, Cornwall, Engl: Stratton, Kernev, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ranulph de Blancminster nasceu em 1278, em Stratton, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Reginald Blanchminster, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Lady Robin, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Wake aproximadamente 1301, em Stratton, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de junho de 1348, em Stratton, Cornwall, Inglaterra, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Stratton, Cornwall, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Ranulph de Blancminster родился в 1278 г. в местности страттон, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Reginald Blanchminster было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Robin, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Wake около 1301 г. в местности страттон, корнвалл, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 23 июня 1348 г. в местности страттон, корнвалл, Англия в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности страттон, корнвалл, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Ranulph de Blancminster nació en 1278, en Stratton, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Reginald Blanchminster, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Lady Robin, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Mary Wake aproximadamente 1301, en Stratton, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 23 de junio de 1348, en Stratton, Cornwall, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Stratton, Cornwall, Inglaterra.
